event: View of Menshikov's Palace on Vasilievsky Island
description: A black-and-white engraving showing an aerial view of a grand Baroque palace complex on a waterfront. The main building is a large, multi-story structure with a columned facade. Behind it, formal gardens with tree-lined avenues extend to the rear. Ships and boats are visible in the water in the foreground. A single figure stands in the lower right corner. The style is typical of early eighteenth-century Russian architectural prints, with precise line work and detailed rendering of the building and its surroundings.

_meta.title: View of A. Menshikov's Palace on Vasilievsky Island
